_doc: Production best-pipeline config. Read by tracking.best_pipeline.build_tracks. Knobs originally chosen by an Optuna sweep across the 7-clip benchmark; see docs/PIPELINE_SPEC.md and docs/EXPERIMENTS_LOG.md for provenance. The production code overrides pp_min_total_frames (60 -> 20), pp_id_merge_max_gap (8 -> 48), and pp_id_merge_iou_thresh (0.5 -> 0.10) at the call-site -- the constants live in tracking/best_pipeline.py.
